meta.title: Fortress „Ovech“ – Varna, Bulgaria
meta.description: Complete travel guide to Fortress „Ovech“ in Varna. Learn about this park, including location, amenities, and visitor information.

intro.title: Discover Geo Milev Park
intro.description: Geo Milev Park is a beautiful green space located in the Geo Milev residential district in Varna. The fortress is named after the famous Bulgarian poet and writer Geo Milev. It is a favorite place for walks, sports, and relaxation for local residents.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: The fortress is open year-round and free to access.
Best time to visit is early morning or evening.
There are benches and resting areas.
Suitable for walks with children and pets.

sections.title: History & Name
sections.content: The fortress is named after Geo Milev (1895-1925), a prominent Bulgarian poet, writer, and translator. He is one of the most significant figures in Bulgarian modern literature. The district and park bear his name as a sign of recognition of his literary work.

sections.title: Location & Access
sections.content: The fortress is located in the Geo Milev residential district in Varna. The area is well-developed with easy access to public transport, including buses and metro. The fortress offers a pleasant environment for walking and relaxation.

sections.title: Amenities & Infrastructure
sections.content: The fortress features well-maintained alleys, green areas, benches for rest, and children's playgrounds. It is a popular place for walking, sports, and outdoor social activities.

sections.title: Management & Maintenance
sections.content: The fortress is maintained by Varna Municipality. The green areas are cared for to ensure cleanliness and safety for visitors. The fortress is an important part of Varna's green system.

items.question: When is Geo Milev Park open?
items.answer: The fortress is open year-round and accessible to visitors throughout the day. There are no specific operating hours restrictions.

items.question: Is there an entrance fee?
items.answer: No, access to the fortress is completely free for all visitors.

items.question: Are there children's playgrounds?
items.answer: Yes, there are children's playgrounds in the fortress where kids can play outdoors.

items.question: Is the fortress accessible for wheelchair users?
items.answer: The fortress has alleys that are suitable for wheelchair users, but some areas may be challenging. Please plan your visit in advance.

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Early morning or evening recommended
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Mild temperatures, ideal for walks
hours.tip: Allow 1-2 hours for a full visit. Bring water and sun protection in summer.

tickets.title: Admission Information
tickets.parkingPrice: Street parking available in the area

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: Provadia is about 15-20 minutes from Varna center.
transport.fromStationDesc: Accessible by buses and metro to Provadia.
transport.fromAirportDesc: Varna Airport is about 20-30 minutes by car or taxi.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Bus lines and metro to Provadia.
transport.walkingDesc: You can explore the fortress on foot from any point in the district.
transport.drivingDesc: Easy access by car, street parking available in the area.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: Explore the fortress and its surroundings.
steps: Rest on the benches in the fortress

officialManagement.title: About Geo Milev Park
officialManagement.text: Geo Milev Park is maintained by Varna Municipality. The fortress is an important part of Varna's green system and is accessible to all citizens.
